title: Biggest WTF Moment in the Show
display_title: Biggest WTF Moment in the Show
wikitext:
[]: Biggest WTF?! Moment in the Show             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Thu Dec 03, 2009 2:23 am What was the biggest shocker/surprise/SERIOUSLY??? type moment for you watching the show for the first time? Mine is a tie between seeing Adam fused to Gendo's hand and when Naoko Akagi chokes out Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Dec 03, 2009 3:53 am The entire second half of EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 03, 2009 6:32 am A good majority of the second half of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Dec 03, 2009 10:06 am Unit-01 getting teh munchies. Also, Asuka raging in the bathroom made me go ....does that count?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Dec 03, 2009 11:01 am When I first watched this, the last two eps were easily the most WTF moment.

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:00 pm I'd have to say Asuka's "mind rape" scene

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Thu Dec 03, 2009 12:53 pm Asuka dyeing in EoE, after that beautiful fight x.x My brain just froze when I saw it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:10 pm The kitchen scene in EoE. Not having seen the DC version of 24, I had no idea where this was coming from. As the collage of images flashed by afterwards, I held an impromptu Two Minute Hate.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:30 pm Magma diver. My ability to accept anime physics only extends so far.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 03, 2009 1:42 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Magma diver.

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Thu Dec 03, 2009 3:57 pm I tried to avoid all spoilers while I was watching the series. Though I did see a bit about Rei being a clone, the Reiquarium was quite a shock to me. Natsuka_Chie wrote: Asuka dyeing in EoE, after that beautiful fight x.x My brain just froze when I saw it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Dec 03, 2009 4:08 pm Episode 25. Need I say more?

[]:             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Thu Dec 03, 2009 4:10 pm Bomby von Bombsville wrote: the Reiquarium was quite a shock to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Dec 03, 2009 4:46 pm When Shinji envokes the wrath of his cream filling by Asuka's comatose body.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 03, 2009 4:51 pm Wait I just remembered. The Alternate Reality sequence in episode 26. That was an awesome "WFT?"! Rei's out of characterness plus the way her voice was added to the hilarity and WTF-ness of it all. Definitely one of my favorite moments in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Thu Dec 03, 2009 5:29 pm DAVEvangelion wrote: Bomby von Bombsville wrote: the Reiquarium was quite a shock to me.

[]:             Quote Post by DAVEvangelion » Thu Dec 03, 2009 5:41 pm Uriel Septim VII wrote: I thought they were dumb, soulless fleshbags. Those smiles couldn't have been evidence of emotions.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 03, 2009 7:58 pm I thought the entire shows was WTF-worthy.

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Thu Dec 03, 2009 8:19 pm Hmmm.... Well there's Unit-01's dinner time, The Dummy plug, Asuka's mind rape, Rei's mind rape, Ritsuko's freakout, Shinji's milky surprise, Misato's death (the way she just exited the series after you had connected with her character was a bit much), Asuka saying "I don't want to die..." Asuka's/Unit-02's death (not the fight, because that was very satisfying), The entire second half of EoE, and of course eps. 25 and 26.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Thu Dec 03, 2009 9:56 pm It's been quite a while since I sat through EoE, but IIRC that scene at the end of Asuka's fight against the MP Evas, when she's reaching up toward the harpies circling over her, and her arm SPLITS down the middle... That definitely damaged my calm. I'm not even exactly sure why, but it was just one of those things I wish I could un-see.
